hero.name: Yahia
hero.title: React Native & Front-End Developer
hero.subtitle: 8+ years · 30+ Published Apps · App Store & Google Play

about.bio: React Native and Front-End Developer with 8+ years of experience building and shipping production-grade mobile apps. Currently at Alyomhost and Inspire Studio in Mansoura — 30+ apps delivered to App Store and Google Play. My Information Security background gives me a security-conscious mindset I bring to every codebase. I also co-own and operate Valeria Skin Care, a cosmetics brand — a rare combination of technical depth and real-world business understanding.

contact.subtitle: Open to senior React Native / Front-End roles, freelance projects, and technical collaborations.
